case_title: JULIA MARIA VALENCIA VS. ARTURO HERNANDEZ et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-05-2008 CONTINUED TO OCT-17-2008 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR ANSWER(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING NOV-23-2009 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-23-2009 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (212)
